query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_registros, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT numero_guia) as guias_unicas,
       COUNT(DISTINCT nome_beneficiario) as beneficiarios_unicos,
       MIN(data_pagto) as primeira_data,
       MAX(data_pagto) as ultima_data
FROM recebimentos_excel 
WHERE convenioId = 60008 
LIMIT 1
